wait.rollingVsBudget: 90000 rolling window; 900000 meta budget guide — do not block one CLI call for 15m

notes.ssot: Behavior SSOT = PLAYBOOK.md. Hard list = LESSONS.md. Structured contracts = this file (wait, rpcIdPaths, speed, audit, reclaim, midRunReclaim, workers). Do not invent models/flags.
notes.claudeModels: plan and code-review: opus + --dangerously-skip-permissions. Do not invent full model ids after hang.
notes.codexFlags: Terminal workers: -a never -s danger-full-access. implement=xhigh; review/fix=high. codex exec: no -a; use --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox.
notes.codexStuck: Update/shell/Ready-no-tools after inject = hung. No re-inject stuck pane; ready + fresh terminal + new dispatch. Max 1 hang recovery per role×task.
notes.paths: Use $HOME or repo-relative paths. Never commit absolute /Users/<name>/ paths. Never stage .scv/**.
notes.userFacingLanguage: Korean for progress/questions/FINAL; English OK for roles/paths/ids/CLI and quoted scv_line only
notes.userFacingNarration: One line: **【 한글 phase 】** "scv_line" — summary · 다음: next. Equal space inside 【 】. No scv · prefix. Phase enter only.
notes.terminalTitles: Korean fixed labels per role (계획 작성, 구현, …). create --title / split+rename. Same as display-name.
notes.taskLabels: display-name=Korean role label required. task-title=[scv:$RUN_ID] 한글 phase · slug.
notes.waitDescription: Korean: '{phase} 완료 대기 (worker_done)'. Forbid 'Rolling wait…'. See PLAYBOOK.
notes.docsLanguage: Default ko for committed docs prose. Resolve: user > .orca/scv.md docsLanguage > defaultDocsLanguage.
notes.peerRuns: Soft-observe other [scv:*] tasks; task-list has no branch field.
notes.changelog_1_3_0: 2026-07-19: coordination hygiene — NDJSON wait parse, straggler drop, Codex stuck recovery, terminal idempotent, recovery SSOT
notes.changelog_1_3_1: 2026-07-20: RPC id paths; JSON-sequence wait; per-task activeDispatch; wait·liveness fusion; step-preserving speed
notes.changelog_1_3_2: 2026-07-20: mid-run soft reclaim — opt-in, default keep, evidence escrow, two-phase, no --tab
notes.changelog_1_3_3: 2026-07-20: UX display — SCV dialogue lines + Korean terminal titles (orchestration behavior unchanged)
notes.changelog_1_3_4: 2026-07-20: UX — one-line narration; Korean display-name/task-title; Korean wait shell descriptions
notes.changelog_docs_hygiene: 2026-07-20: tooling+docs slim (LESSONS hard list, quick-command, SKILL, pack pointer, notes, sync-from-source, selfcheck) — orchestration behavior unchanged
notes.uxSsot: Display SSOT = UX.md + meta.ui. Behavior SSOT = PLAYBOOK.md. Engine worker_done CLI = orchestration skill structured flags only.
notes.workerDoneCli: Prefer --task-id/--dispatch-id/--files-modified/--report-path. Never combine with --payload. LIFECYCLE block required at top of every task --spec.
notes.changelog_1_3_5: 2026-07-20: structured worker_done only; UX.md extract; LIFECYCLE in specs; selfcheck anchors (orchestration behavior unchanged)
notes.humanGates: Human decision gates: AskUser (ask_user_question) exactly once. No prose re-ask. Intake empty seed = free-text once. Coordinator Grok only.
notes.changelog_1_3_6: 2026-07-20: AskUser-only human decision gates; no duplicate plan-approve prose (orchestration pipeline unchanged)
